assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 7 of claude-md-result.md: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches the expected Role ('Rust backend service'), Serena Instance ('serena_backend'), and Path ('/home/user/trustify-backend') exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: Line 8 of claude-md-result.md: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new trustify-ui row is present with serena_ui as the Serena Instance.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 12-16 of claude-md-result.md show: Project key: TC, Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432, Feature issue type ID: 10142, Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875, GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747. All values match the expected configuration exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has a '## Preserved (unchanged)' section listing the trustify-backend registry entry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence section, and serena_backend limitations entry. It has an '## Added' section listing the trustify-ui registry entry and serena_ui limitations entry. Both preserved and added entries are explicitly labeled.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md table (lines 9-12) shows serena_backend with Status 'Already configured in Repository Registry' and serena_ui with Status 'NEW -- not yet in Repository Registry'. Section '### serena_backend (existing)' states 'No changes needed. Entry already present in Repository Registry.' Section '### serena_ui (new)' states 'Added to Repository Registry with user-provided metadata.'

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 20-21 of claude-md-result.md preserve the naming convention text: 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' Lines 25-29 preserve the serena_backend example code block verbatim. Line 33 preserves the serena_backend limitation: 'rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use'. The only addition is line 34: '- `serena_ui`: No known limitations'.
